title: cerastium ciliatum var. brevifolium
intro: Cerastium ciliatum var. brevifolium, also known as the Short-petaled Mouse-ear Chickweed, is a low-growing perennial plant that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Cerastium ciliatum var. brevifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
